name: Lunes
description: High-performance blockchain for RWA tokenization, DeFi, and scalable Web3 infrastructure.
longDescription:
Lunes Network is a high-performance blockchain built to power the next generation of the digital economy. Founded in 2017, Lunes has evolved into a robust ecosystem focused on Real-World Asset (RWA) tokenization, decentralized finance (DeFi), digital identity, and scalable Web3 applications.

Built on the Substrate framework and operating under the Nominated Proof-of-Stake (NPoS) consensus mechanism, the network delivers security, energy efficiency, and decentralized governance. Its smart contracts are developed using Ink! WebAssembly, ensuring high performance, flexibility, and interoperability.

With a maximum supply of 200 million LUNES and a continuous deflationary policy — including progressive transaction fee burns until reaching 50 million coins — the economic model is designed to promote sustainable scarcity and long-term alignment with the community.

Lunes is globally positioned as a blockchain infrastructure for enterprises, governments, and entrepreneurs seeking to tokenize assets, structure DAO models, and build decentralized solutions with transparency, security, and financial inclusion.

Mission: To empower individuals and organizations worldwide with decentralized financial tools, democratizing access to the digital economy through a reliable, adaptable, and globally scalable blockchain.

Lunes Network — infrastructure for tokenizing the real world.

milestones.title: Mainnet Launch
milestones.description: Lançamento da mainnet Lunes baseada em Substrate

milestones.title: Smart Contracts (Ink!)
milestones.description: Ativação do pallet-contracts para smart contracts WASM

milestones.title: Staking NPoS
milestones.description: Sistema de staking com Nominated Proof-of-Stake

milestones.title: Pallet Assets
milestones.description: Suporte a tokens fungíveis nativos na chain

milestones.title: Explorer v2
milestones.description: Nova versão do explorer com dados em tempo real via RPC

name: LUSDT
description: Stablecoin pareada ao dólar americano na rede Lunes, emitida como asset nativo via pallet-assets.
longDescription: LUSDT é uma stablecoin na rede Lunes pareada 1:1 ao dólar americano (USD). Diferente de stablecoins em smart contracts, LUSDT é um asset nativo da blockchain, criado via pallet-assets, o que garante maior performance e menor custo de transação. É o principal par de trading no ecossistema Lunes e serve como base para DeFi na rede.

milestones.title: Asset Creation
milestones.description: Criação do asset LUSDT na chain

name: PidChat
description: Decentralized communication protocol built on the Lunes Network with a native social token.
longDescription: PidChat is a decentralized messaging and communication protocol built on the Lunes Network. The project uses Ink! smart contracts to manage identities and communication channels, and features a native social token registered as an asset on the blockchain. Its goal is to create a censorship-resistant communication platform where users have full control over their data and digital identity.

milestones.title: Token Launch
milestones.description: Lançamento do token PIDCHAT como asset nativo

milestones.title: Protocol Beta
milestones.description: Versão beta do protocolo de mensagens
